prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第62名，近年排名稳定在48–62区 间，属全国中上游水平；该校在声誉文件中未见明显负面舆情或投档异常记录；抖音热度未进入前100名，整体曝光度一般，报考关注度平稳；石油与天然气工程为A+学科（全国顶尖），化学工程与技术为A-学科，安全科学与工程为B+学科，地质资源与地质工程为B+学科，与该校石油石化主干专业高度匹配，对相关方 向考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热，石油工程、化工与制药类等传统工科热度一般；安徽省2026年高 考总人数约45.1万，较2025年总人数约46.2万略有下降，物理类考生估算约31.3万，较2025年约32.1万减少约2.4%，竞争压力略有减轻；该校位于北京，对安徽 省考生有一定跨省吸引力；2025年该校在安徽省招生占比约2.84%（全国总招生598人中安徽17人），属中等偏下水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年 计划小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、安徽省考生总数略降以及学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约22145名，区间21645 –22645名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 17760 → 19414 → 16176 → 19804 → 22637, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted backward by about 2833 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in five years, with a baseline ranking of about 22637. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province was 107 in 2021 → 112 in 2022 → 115 in 2023 → 121 in 2024 → 123 in 2025, with continuous slight expansion. The 2026 plan is 119, a decrease of 4 from 2025, a slight contraction of about 3.25%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 48–62 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. No significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records were found in the university's reputation documents. Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100, with overall exposure being average and application attention stable. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A- discipline, Safety Science and Engineering is a B+ discipline, and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering is a B+ discipline, highly matching the university's main petroleum and petrochemical majors, providing stable appeal to candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society, while traditional engineering majors like Petroleum Engineering and Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering have average popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Anhui Province is about 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 313,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from about 321,000 in 2025, slightly reducing competitive pressure. The university is located in Beijing, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Anhui candidates. In 2025, the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui Province was about 2.84% (17 out of 598 total national enrollment), at a medium-low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight contraction in 2026 plans (easing competition), a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, and stable university reputation, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly forward (smaller ranking number). The predicted minimum ranking is about 22145, with a range of 21645–22645.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 21645–22645, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Automation, New Energy Science and Engineering, Mechanical Class) as primary choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Carbon Neutrality Innovation Class) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, Business Administration Class, Environmental Class) as safe backups. The university's main petroleum and petrochemical majors have outstanding disciplinary strength, and candidates with clear career plans in the industry can focus on characteristic majors such as Petroleum Engineering and Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It is a science and engineering institution with very few liberal arts majors (only Ideological and Political Education and English), and its overall strength in liberal arts is not a dominant direction. No significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records were found in the university's reputation documents. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100, indicating generally low attention. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in petroleum and petrochemical engineering fields, with no A-class disciplines in liberal arts. Ideological and Political Education belongs to the Marxist Theory discipline (not separately rated at this university), and English belongs to the Foreign Languages and Literature discipline (not separately rated at this university), resulting in weak disciplinary support for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.text: Located in Beijing, the university has some geographical appeal to liberal arts candidates in Anhui Province, but the enrollment number is extremely small (only 6 students), leading to high randomness. The social popularity of Ideological and Political Education is generally moderate and wait-and-see, while English (foreign language category) also has moderate and wait-and-see social popularity. Overall, the popularity of liberal arts majors is stable. 预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation trend of History Category rankings within the 3000–3300 range, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in History Category candidates in Anhui Province, and the university's non-dominant liberal arts direction, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3054, with a range of 2554–3554.
